ctaCard.title: Get Career Ready
ctaCard.bullet2: Stand out to clients when you get certified

overview.whyBody: Build the confidence and practical experience needed to succeed on the Fixam platform. In this career path, you will work through realistic case studies, practice correct tool usage, and compare your solutions with standard model answers from certified trainers.
overview.metaLine: Self-paced · {{hours}} hours · No grades · No assessments · {{level}}

sidebar.calloutDesc: Gain fast-track entry into our elite verified group of service providers globally.
sidebar.skillsTitle: Skills you will learn and practice:

howWorks.title: How it works
howWorks.step1: Complete tasks guided by step-by-step lessons and example answers from Fixam's trainers. No live sessions, all self-paced.
howWorks.step2: Earn a certificate and add it to your Fixam profile to show clients you're qualified.
howWorks.step3: Stand out when applying to jobs. Confidently explain your skills and experience to clients.

closingBanner.title: Not the right path for you?

taskFlow.intro: Great, now let's get started on your task!
taskFlow.videoIntro: Hear from a Fixam trainer introduce this task
taskFlow.backgroundTitle: Here is the background information on your task
taskFlow.submitHint: When you have finished your work, click Next to submit.
